subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.34
question_html:
Which alcohol would produce a carboxylic acid when heated with acidified potassium dichromate(VI)?

A. propan-2-ol

B. butan-1-ol

C. 2-methylpropan-2-ol

D. pentan-3-ol
examiners_html: 75 % of candidates could correctly identify the oxidation of a primary alcohol to form carboxylic acid.
